codeReviewsPage.title: Code & reviews
codeReviewsPage.description: Configure your code review integrations, editor preferences and workflow automations.

enableReviews.title: Enable code reviews
enableReviews.description: Sync GitHub pull requests with Linear issues and track review status automatically.

theme.title: Code theme
theme.description: Color scheme used for code blocks and inline snippets.

font.title: Font
font.description: Typeface used in code editors and snippet previews.

language.title: Language
language.description: Default programming language for new code snippets.

gitFormat.title: Git attachment format
gitFormat.description: How Git references are displayed when attached to an issue.

moveToBranchCopy.title: Move issue to Started when copying git branch
moveToBranchCopy.description: Automatically change the issue status when you copy the branch name.

moveToOpenTool.title: Move issue to Started when opening in coding tool
moveToOpenTool.description: Automatically change the issue status when you open it in your IDE.
